# Getting help with PowMon

Pick the channel that fits — it keeps answers searchable for the next person.

- 💬 **Questions, setup help, "is my inverter supported?"** →
  [Discussions › Q&A](https://github.com/Jesuso/powmon/discussions/categories/q-a)
- 💡 **Feature ideas & requests** →
  [Discussions › Ideas](https://github.com/Jesuso/powmon/discussions/categories/ideas)
- 🐛 **Something's broken** →
  [open a bug report](https://github.com/Jesuso/powmon/issues/new/choose)
- 📖 **Docs** →
  [install](../docs/install-basic.md) ·
  [architecture](../docs/architecture.md) ·
  [hardware](../docs/hardware.md) ·
  [troubleshooting](../docs/install-basic.md#troubleshooting)

Please don't use the issue tracker for general questions — Discussions is the
place for those. Bugs and accepted, actionable work live as issues.
